case.title: ANNBAR ASSOCIATES v. WEST SIDE REDEVELOPMENT CORP.

opinion.h4: ANNBAR ASSOCIATES v. WEST SIDE REDEVELOPMENT CORP., (1966)
ANNBAR ASSOCIATES ET AL. v. WEST SIDE REDEVELOPMENT CORP. ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSOURI. No. 152. Decided October 10, 1966.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
GLICK ET AL. v. BALLENTINE PRODUCE INC., ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSOURI. No. 168. Decided October 10, 1966.
Elwyn L. Cady, Jr., for appellants.
Morris H. Kross, John R. Caslavka, Harry P. Thomson, Jr., and E. E. Thompson for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
